knowledge_01.name: #1 - Building Flexibility
knowledge_01.body: Ignore the rule that only one building of each type is allowed in each city. You may now place duplicate building types in the same city.

knowledge_02.name: #2 - Mine Worker Bonus
knowledge_02.body: Receive 1 worker tile in addition to the usual Silverling for each mine at the end of each phase.
knowledge_02.summary: +1 worker per mine at phase end
knowledge_02.details: Stacks with the normal Silverling income from mines

knowledge_03.name: #3 - Goods Sale Silverling Bonus
knowledge_03.body: Receive 2 Silverlings instead of 1 when selling goods (either via the Sell Goods dice action or via the Warehouse building).
knowledge_03.summary: 2 Silverlings per goods sale instead of 1
knowledge_03.details: Applies to both the dice action and the Warehouse building effect

knowledge_04.name: #4 - Goods Sale Worker Bonus
knowledge_04.body: Receive 1 worker tile in addition to the usual Silverling when selling goods (via the Sell Goods dice action or via the Warehouse building).
knowledge_04.details: Applies to both the dice action and the Warehouse building effect

knowledge_05.name: #5 - Double Ship Goods
knowledge_05.body: When adding a ship tile to your estate, you may choose to take goods from two neighboring goods spaces (instead of one) and add them all to your goods storage.
knowledge_05.summary: Take goods from 2 depots when placing a ship
knowledge_05.details: The two depots must be neighboring spaces

knowledge_06.name: #6 - All Depots Access
knowledge_06.body: May buy tiles from all seven depots on the board (still only one purchase per turn, costing 2 Silverlings).
knowledge_06.summary: Buy from any of the 7 depots
knowledge_06.details: Normally you can only buy from the central black depot. Still limited to one purchase per turn.

knowledge_07.name: #7 - Animal Scoring Bonus
knowledge_07.body: Receive 1 VP more for each animal tile that scores points when a new animal tile is added to your estate.
knowledge_07.summary: +1 VP per scoring animal when placing animals
knowledge_07.details: This bonus applies to every animal that scores, including same-type animals already on the pasture

knowledge_08.name: #8 - Enhanced Worker Adjustment
knowledge_08.body: May adjust a die result by up to +/- 2 per worker tile spent (instead of the usual +/- 1).
knowledge_08.details: Each worker tile spent gives +/- 2 instead of +/- 1. Wraps around (1 to 6 and vice versa).

knowledge_09.name: #9 - Building Placement Flexibility
knowledge_09.body: May adjust all die results used to place buildings (brown tiles) on your estate by +/- 1 for free (without spending workers).
knowledge_09.details: Only applies when placing building tiles from storage to estate

knowledge_10.name: #10 - Ship & Animal Placement Flexibility
knowledge_10.body: May adjust all die results used to place ships (blue tiles) or animals (light green tiles) on your estate by +/- 1 for free (without spending workers).
knowledge_10.summary: Free +/- 1 for placing ships or animals
knowledge_10.details: Only applies when placing ship or animal tiles from storage to estate

knowledge_11.name: #11 - Castle/Mine/Knowledge Flexibility
knowledge_11.body: May adjust all die results used to place castles (dark green tiles), mines (grey tiles), or knowledge tiles (yellow tiles) on your estate by +/- 1 for free (without spending workers).
knowledge_11.summary: Free +/- 1 for placing castles, mines, or knowledge
knowledge_11.details: Only applies when placing these tile types from storage to estate

knowledge_12.name: #12 - Tile Taking Flexibility
knowledge_12.body: May adjust any die results used to take new 6-sided tiles from the game board (depots) by +/- 1 for free (without spending workers).
knowledge_12.summary: Free +/- 1 when taking tiles from depots
knowledge_12.details: Only applies to the Take Tile action, not placement

knowledge_13.name: #13 - Worker Action Silverling Bonus
knowledge_13.body: Receive 1 Silverling in addition to the 2 worker tiles when choosing the 'Take Worker Tiles' dice action.
knowledge_13.details: Only applies to the dice action, not other worker-gaining effects

knowledge_14.name: #14 - Enhanced Worker Action
knowledge_14.body: Receive 4 worker tiles (instead of the usual 2) when choosing the 'Take Worker Tiles' dice action.
knowledge_14.summary: 4 workers instead of 2 from dice action
knowledge_14.details: Only applies to the dice action, not other worker-gaining effects

knowledge_15.name: #15 - Goods Type Diversity Bonus
knowledge_15.body: Receive 3 VPs at the end of the game for each goods type that was sold during the game. Unsold goods are ignored.
knowledge_15.summary: 3 VP per goods type sold at end
knowledge_15.details: End-game scoring. Only counts distinct types of goods that were sold, not individual tiles.

knowledge_16.name: #16 - Warehouse Bonus
knowledge_16.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Warehouse (building) that has been added to your estate.

knowledge_17.name: #17 - Carpenter's Workshop Bonus
knowledge_17.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Carpenter's Workshop (building) that has been added to your estate.
knowledge_17.summary: 4 VP per Carpenter's Workshop on estate

knowledge_18.name: #18 - Church Bonus
knowledge_18.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Church (building) that has been added to your estate.

knowledge_19.name: #19 - Market Bonus
knowledge_19.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Market (building) that has been added to your estate.

knowledge_20.name: #20 - Boarding House Bonus
knowledge_20.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Boarding House (building) that has been added to your estate.
knowledge_20.summary: 4 VP per Boarding House on estate

knowledge_21.name: #21 - Bank Bonus
knowledge_21.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Bank (building) that has been added to your estate.

knowledge_22.name: #22 - City Hall Bonus
knowledge_22.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each City Hall (building) that has been added to your estate.
knowledge_22.summary: 4 VP per City Hall on estate

knowledge_23.name: #23 - Watchtower Bonus
knowledge_23.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each Watchtower (building) that has been added to your estate.

knowledge_24.name: #24 - Animal Diversity Bonus
knowledge_24.body: Receive 4 VPs at the end of the game for each animal type that has been added to your estate.
knowledge_24.summary: 4 VP per animal type on estate
knowledge_24.details: End-game scoring. Counts distinct animal types, not individual tiles.

knowledge_25.name: #25 - Sold Goods Bonus
knowledge_25.body: Receive 1 VP at the end of the game for each sold goods tile. Unsold goods are ignored.
knowledge_25.summary: 1 VP per goods tile sold at end
knowledge_25.details: End-game scoring. Counts individual tiles sold, not types.

knowledge_26.name: #26 - Bonus Tile Collector
knowledge_26.body: Receive 2 VPs at the end of the game for each bonus tile claimed (large or small).
knowledge_26.details: End-game scoring. Includes both large and small color-completion bonus tiles.
